response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience and strong craftsmanship credentials (TDD, CI/CD, testing infrastructure), but the resume shows no experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core competencies for this Principal Growth/Experimentation role. Title progression (Senior/Staff) and team-scope evidence fall short of IC6 Principal-level expectations for cross-org platform leadership.
strengths: 15+ years polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput data services (Sociomantic)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD, open-source tooling authorship
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) shows AI-tooling fluency
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation frameworks, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout/risk controls
No evidence of metrics platforms, statistical analysis, or data-science partnership at scale
Career level (Senior/Staff at small-to-mid companies) doesn't show Principal/IC6 cross-org platform leadership

key_factors.factor: No telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical analysis background
Deep polyglot engineering tenure with craftsmanship rigor
